top_signals.title: U.S. says it targeted Iranian forces after attacks that killed two American service members
top_signals.summary: Centcom says it hit Iran's coastal surveillance and air defense facilities a day after two U.S. troops were killed in an Iranian strike on Jordan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
